top_signals.title: Bitcoin hits $65.5K as more surprise US inflation data sparks three-week BTC price high
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin moved up to its highest levels since June 22 as US PPI inflation numbers provided the week’s second surprise macro data drop.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: DTCC, Wall Street’s post-trade powerhouse, tests tokenized markets with industry heavy hitters
top_signals.summary: The DTCC is pushing to bring tokenization of real world assets from concept to reality using existing financial infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Personal Income and Outlays, April 2026
top_signals.summary: Personal income decreased less than $0.1 billion (less than 0.1 percent at a monthly rate) in April, according to estimates released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA). Disposable personal income (DPI)-personal income less personal current taxes-decreased $19.9 billion (0.1 percent), and personal consumption expenditures (PCE) increased $111.1 billion (0.5 percent). Personal outlays-the sum of PCE, personal interest payments, and personal current transfer payments-increased $114.0 billion in April. Personal saving was $611.7 billion in April, and the personal saving rate-personal saving as a percentage of DPI-was 2.6 percent. Full Text
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: EU and India strengthen strategic partnership with third Trade and Technology Council
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 15 Jul 2026 Today, the European Union and India held the third meeting of their Trade and Technology Council (TTC) in Brussels, reaffirming the TTC as a central platform for cooperation on trade, technology and security.

top_signals.title: Jamie’s Italian is awful but don’t worry, there are some great new Mediterranean restaurants too
top_signals.summary: This week I talk about two Italians, one Greek, a talented Cypriot and an irritating Englishman. Prepare to read about two restaurants you should visit (Bancone and Zylia) and one you should reserve for your worst enemies (Jamie’s Italian)… ZYLIA Covent Garden is a part of London that you only go to for a specific [...]
